episodes.title: Cult expert says Zizian fringe group tied to killing of US CBP uses behavior control.
episodes.description:
In this Fox News Digital interview (February 9, 2026), cult expert Dar Dixon breaks down how the Zizian group — the fringe collective tied to the shooting death of US Border Patrol Agent David Maland and five other killings across three states — runs textbook behavior control on its members.

Using Dr. Steven Hassan's BITE Model of Authoritarian Control (Behavior, Information, Thought, Emotion), Dar maps the Zizians' stack: sexual identity, restrictive diet (veganism), sleep deprivation, emotional shutdown, and ideological enforcement through shunning and reprimand. Each control vector individually weakens autonomy. Stacked, they hand a leader total ownership of the follower.

Dar's analysis is grounded in a 20-year ordeal with the high-control group Eternal Values, and decades of subsequent study in cult psychology, influence, and recovery frameworks. He is the author of the forthcoming memoir THE WALK-IN.

CHAPTERS
0:00 — Why the Zizian group hits every major cult marker
0:26 — Identity + restrictive diet = behavior control
0:47 — Dr. Steven Hassan and the BITE Model
1:34 — Emotional control: how members are forced to bury feelings
1:54 — Shunning, reprimand, social ostracism
2:15 — The cumulative grip: "now I own you"

Dar Dixon appears in all three episodes of the upcoming HBO docuseries directed by three-time Emmy Award winner Chris Smith (June 2026).

#Zizians #ZizLaSota #Cult #BITEModel #BorderPatrol #DavidMaland #BehaviorControl #CultEducation #FoxNewsDigital #DarDixon #TheWalkIn

episodes.title: The Hoyt Richards Experience v2.0
episodes.description:
Hoyt Richards is an American model and actor.

Richards became one of the biggest names in modeling in the late 1980s and 1990s. He appeared in hundreds of advertising campaigns and was photographed by Bruce Weber, Richard Avedon, Helmut Newton, Steven Meisel, Horst, and Albert Watson.

His campaigns include Gianni Versace, Valentino, Gianfranco Ferré, Ralph Lauren, Burberry, Dunhill, Cartier, and Donna Karan.

Eventually, his trips to New York for auditions lead to him a meeting with the Ford Model Agency. Thus began his career as a male model. This career spanned over fifteen years and encompassed over 200 major ads and hundreds of commercials.

He's my friend... and a guy that got involved in a pseudo religious, doomsday cult.

Just like me.

In fact, that's how we met and became friends.

See?

Even in the midst of a shit situation like a cult, a beautiful lifelong friendship can form.

~~~~

IN THIS EPISODE:

4:20       How so much verbal and emotional abuse happens in Hollywood

15:33     I think the hardest part of the story is to recognize you've been duped.

26:07      Life is really about shades of gray.

29:28      How do I make these guys think that this is their idea and I get out of Dodge?

34:11      The truth is recovery is not sexy.

50:25      Never underestimate the power of denial or the stupidity of mobs

58:15      Our desire to fit in and be social.

1:11:24   Be Of Service - The Key To Peace, Love, Success, Happiness

1:14:58    You may be wrestling with alcohol, drug addiction, sex addiction, domestic violence can hear that the dynamic

1:16:30    We were both hell bent on getting better.

~~~~
